title: Sip and chug lid
abstract: A lid for a vessel, such as, a drinking vessel is described. The lid comprises a lid body; a chugging spout comprising an inner port and an outer port; and a straw mouthpiece extending through the inner port. The outer port is open to allow passage of fluid and the straw mouthpiece defines an open conduit to allow passage of fluid. The chugging spout may comprise a complementary chamfer or bevel to interfit and rotate with the straw mouthpiece. Attached to the straw mouthpiece may be a straw spring which has a bent or loaded conformation when in a chug configuration and a linear or unloaded conformation when in a sip configuration may be attached the straw mouthpiece.
claims: Claims 1 . A lid for a vessel, the lid comprising: a lid body; a chugging spout comprising an inner port and an outer port; and a straw mouthpiece extending through the inner port, ; wherein the outer port is open to allow passage of fluid and the straw mouthpiece defines an open conduit to allow passage of fluid. 2. A vessel comprising the lid according to claim 1 . 3. A kit comprising one or more lids according to claim 1 and optionally one or more vessel. 4. The lid according to claim 1 wherein the lid body comprises a lid body top wall and a lid body sidewall. 5. The lid according to claim 1 or claim 4 wherein the lid body further comprises a chugging spout seal. 6. The lid according to any one of claims 1 to 5 wherein the lid body comprises a hinge mount. 7. The lid according to any one of claims 1 to 6 wherein the lid body comprises a main orifice. 8. The lid according to any one of claims 1 to 7 wherein the lid comprises an overcap to cover at least a portion of the lid body. 9. The lid according to any one of claims 1 to 8 wherein the chugging spout comprises a mouthpiece. 10. The lid according to any one of claims 1 to 9 wherein the straw mouthpiece comprises a drinking straw extending from a mounting body. 11. The lid according to any one of claims 1 to 10 wherein a straw spring is comprised. 12. The lid according to any one claims 1 to 11 wherein the lid comprises an open and close button. 13. The lid according to any one claims 1 to 12 wherein the lid comprises a cylindrical shape or a generally round or circular shape. 14. The vessel according to claim 2 or claim 3 wherein the vessel comprises a vessel fastener for engagement with the cap fastener. 15. The lid according to any one of claims 1 to 13 wherein the chugging spout comprises a complementary chamfer or bevel to interfit and rotate with the straw mouthpiece. 16. The lid according to any one claims 1 to 13 or claim 15 wherein the chugging spout further comprises a spout actuator to actuate raising of the straw mouthpiece. 17. The lid according to any one claims 1 to 13 or claim 15 or claim 16 wherein the straw mouthpiece is adapted for insertion into the chugging spout. 18. The lid according to any one of claims 10 to 13 or any one of claims 15 to 17 wherein the mounting body comprises a wall comprising a complementary chamfer or bevel to interfit and rotate with the chugging spout. 19. The lid according to any one of claims 1 to 13 or any one of claims 15 to 18 comprising a straw spring attached the straw mouthpiece. 20. The lid according to claim 19 wherein the straw spring has a bent or loaded conformation when in the chug configuration and a linear or unloaded conformation when in the sip configuration.
